description: Add a Wage Override for a specific Job Title in a Project. A successful response returns the new Wage Override UUID.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Schema representing the ID of a Wage Override.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Wage Override.

schema.description: Request body schema for adding a Wage Override to a Project.

job_title_id.description: UUID of the Job Title for which the Wage Override applies.

rate.description: Hourly wage rate override for the specified Job Title.
